pi_items.source: XML parsing of the <location> elements in SampleDivesV2.ssrf downloaded from the official repository
XML parsing of SampleDivesV2.ssrf revealing exactly 4 <dive> entries matching the 'Sund Rock' location

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official SampleDivesV2.ssrf file from the Subsurface repository, which contains real dive data. The dataset contains exactly 4 dives associated with the location 'Sund Rock, Hoodsport, WA, USA', directly contradicting the metadata claim of 'Sund Rock WA'. The expected target name 'Sund Rock (Hood Canal)' and expected notes 'Marine Preserve' exactly match the task instructions.
